story.text:
# Stations — the seven

The seven non-empty mixes of head / heart / hands.

- [[Station · head]] — lead advisor
- [[Station · head+heart]] — visionary advisor
- [[Station · head+hands]] — strategist maker
- [[Station · hands]] — lead builder
- [[Station · heart+hands]] — caring builder
- [[Station · heart]] — steward builder
- [[Station · head+heart+hands]] — keystone guide

---
[[Welcome]] · the Game of 42 — six axes × seven stations = 42
